rationale: Builds directly on the current best projection-only gentle clipping path, but shifts the new work from quantizer metadata tweaks to late-training weight shaping. During the quant-aware phase, a second compiled loss adds a projection-only row-normalized outlier penalty on the projection matrices that still end up int8-quantized, so final exact roundtrip needs less destructive clipping on those rows. I also removed dormant logit-chunking branches to keep the script lean and under the 1500-line cap while preserving the evaluation and final serialization path.
title: Late Projection Outlier Regularization
